description: Billy task backlog - auto-spawned when agent slots open

tasks.title: Campaign content download and collection
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill that lets users request campaign content downloads. Query MySQL (db-maestro-prod) for media URLs from a campaign via proofread_medias → actions → media_content joins. Support filtering by status (approved/rejected/pending). Return download links in user-friendly format. Read existing skills at /root/.openclaw/workspace/clawdbots/skills/ for patterns. Test locally with MySQL (creds in ~/.my.cnf). Deploy: rsync -av /root/.openclaw/workspace/clawdbots/skills/ root@89.167.64.183:/root/.openclaw/workspace/skills/

tasks.title: Creator performance analytics
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for creator performance analytics. Query MySQL for creator stats (actions completed, approval rate, campaigns participated). Support: top 10 creators this month, creator X performance, highest approval rate. Include total actions, approved/rejected ratio, avg moderation time, campaigns count. Format as bullet-point summaries (no tables). Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Metabase query replacement for common questions
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill replacing common Metabase queries with direct MySQL/BigQuery. Cover: campaign counts by status, total GMV/revenue, creator signup counts, moderation queue stats, top campaigns by engagement. Pre-built SQL queries with natural language mapping. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Google Sheets export for any data query
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill that exports query results to Google Sheets. Take SQL results → create Sheet → auto-format → share with user → return link. Use Google Sheets API (reference gog skill at /usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/gog/). Support common exports: campaign data, creator lists, moderation results. Use caio.fonseca@brandlovrs.com account. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Campaign lifecycle status tracker
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for campaign lifecycle tracking. Query campaign status from MySQL (draft/active/review/completed/cancelled). Show timeline of status changes, campaigns stuck in X stage >N days, summary of campaigns per stage. Alert-worthy: campaigns in review >3 days, active with no submissions >7 days. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Auto-generate boost spreadsheets
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill to auto-generate boost spreadsheets. Query campaign boost data from MySQL, format into spreadsheet-ready output. Use Google Sheets export. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Screen time and view retention reports
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for screen time and view retention analytics. Query relevant metrics from MySQL/BigQuery. Format as clean summaries. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: OKR progress tracker and reporter
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for OKR tracking. Query metrics relevant to team OKRs, calculate progress percentages. Format as progress reports. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: HubSpot deal pipeline queries
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for HubSpot deal pipeline queries. If HubSpot API available, query deals by stage. Otherwise create mock/template. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Guardian agreement rate monitor
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill to monitor Guardian agreement rate. Query proofread_medias for recent moderation stats, calculate agreement rate by brand/campaign. Alert if rate drops below threshold. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Automated weekly campaign reports
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for automated weekly campaign reports. Aggregate campaign metrics over past 7 days. Include: new campaigns, completions, top performers, issues. Format as Slack-friendly summary. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Campaign health alerts and anomaly detection
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for campaign health monitoring. Detect anomalies: sudden drops in submissions, high rejection rates, stalled campaigns. Alert thresholds configurable. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Zendesk ticket analytics for CS team
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for Zendesk ticket analytics. If Zendesk API available, query ticket counts/categories. Otherwise template for integration. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Revenue forecasting and GMV tracking
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for revenue/GMV forecasting. Query historical revenue data from MySQL/BigQuery, calculate trends, project forward. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Creator churn prediction and alerts
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for creator churn prediction. Identify creators with declining activity, long gaps between submissions. Alert on at-risk creators. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Sales enablement - campaign results for pitches
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for sales enablement. Package campaign success stories with metrics for sales pitches. Include ROI, engagement stats, creator counts. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Budget violation detection and alerts
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for budget violation detection. Monitor campaign spend vs budget. Alert when approaching or exceeding limits. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Cross-platform creator profile unification
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for cross-platform creator profiles. Unify creator data across platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube). Show consolidated view. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Refusal contest analysis and patterns
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for refusal/contest pattern analysis. Query contest data from proofread_medias, identify most contested guideline types, brands with highest contest rates. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.

tasks.title: Proactive daily Slack digest
tasks.task: Build a Billy skill for proactive daily Slack digest. Compile daily summary: campaign updates, moderation stats, alerts, upcoming deadlines. Post to relevant channels. Read existing skills, test locally, deploy via rsync.
